addedStudentAction.description: Class-level default behavior for handling students who are added after the assignment is published. The possible values are: none, assignIfOpen.

addToCalendarAction.description: Optional field to control adding assignments to students' and teachers' calendars when the assignment is published. The possible values are: none, studentsAndPublisher, studentsAndTeamOwners, unknownFutureValue, and studentsOnly. Use the Prefer: include-unknown-enum-members request header to get the following members in this evolvable enum: studentsOnly. The default value is none.

dueTime.description: Class-level default value for due time field. Default value is 23:59:00.

notificationChannelUrl.description: Default Teams channel to which notifications are sent. Default value is null.
